title: Weather Dashboard
subtitle: Fetch APIs, useEffect, and production UI states — loading, error, empty
prerequisites: week1 — functional components, props, useState, controlled forms
week1 — useEffect and async patterns from Days 4–6
day07 — machine coding review: login, dashboard layout, router, custom hooks fundamentals
expectedOutcome: Fetch weather data from a real HTTP API using async/await
Model API responses with TypeScript interfaces including nested objects
Manage loading, error, success, and empty UI states in a single feature
Use useEffect with a correct dependency array to avoid infinite requests
Explain useEffect lifecycle and Fetch vs Axios in interview terms
definitionOfDone: API returns weather data for a searched city
Error UI displays with a working retry button on failure
Empty state shows before first search or when input is cleared
Layout is responsive on mobile and desktop

tomorrowPreview.title: Movie Search Application
tomorrowPreview.summary: Tomorrow you will optimize search with debouncing, extract a useDebounce custom hook, and add pagination — building on today's fetch and state patterns.
